args: ARCHIPELAGO_DIR=/tmp/archipelago-$SERVER_NAME && if [ ! -d "$ARCHIPELAGO_DIR/.git" ]; then git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Mercor-Intelligence/archipelago.git "$ARCHIPELAGO_DIR"; fi && git -C "$ARCHIPELAGO_DIR" fetch --depth 1 origin 7bb3656bc11595685fc63fc8e996676647139178 && git -C "$ARCHIPELAGO_DIR" checkout --force 7bb3656bc11595685fc63fc8e996676647139178 && cd "$ARCHIPELAGO_DIR"/mcp_servers/filesystem && uv sync --all-extras && cd mcp_servers/filesystem_server && uv run python main.py
